name: Gemini Home Entertainment
overview: Gemini Home Entertainment is a found-footage–style analog horror web series presented as recovered public-access broadcasts, educational tapes, and emergency alerts from a corrupted media archive. Using lo-fi VHS aesthetics and ominous interruptions, it implies a hidden history of cosmic threats and government cover-ups. The series is widely regarded as one of the most influential examples of analog horror on YouTube.

trailers.title: WORLD'S WEIRDEST ANIMALS － GEMINI HOME ENTERTAINMENT
